zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha Valoines於大約1130年出生在英國素福爾可帕哈姆時，她的父親Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham32歲，母親Helewise de Valenis21歲。她於大約1146年與Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年在英國素福爾可享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha Valoines于大约1130年出生在英国素福爾可帕哈姆时，她的父亲Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham32岁，母亲Helewise de Valenis21岁。她于大约1146年与Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年在英国素福爾可享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha Valoines was born about 1130, in Parham, Suffolk, England, her father, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, was 32 and her mother, Helewise de Valenis, was 21. She married Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England about 1146. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1208, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 79.

fr.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha Valoines est née environ 1130, à Parham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Helewise de Valenis, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England environ 1146. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1208, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha Valoines um 1130 in Parham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham 32 und ihre Mutter Helewise de Valenis 21. Sie hat um 1146 Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1208 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha Valoines è nata il circa 1130 nel Parham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Helewise de Valenis, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England circa 1146. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1208, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha Valoinesが約1130年にイギリススフォルクパーハムで生まれた時，父Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parhamは32歳，母Helewise de Valenisは21歳であった。約1146年にRanulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年にイギリススフォルクで79歳で死去した。

ko.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 앤드루
ko.lifeSummary: Bertha Valoines(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 수폴크 파람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise de Valenis(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1146년 Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 영국 수폴크에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: Stratford St Andrew, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha Valoines nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Helewise de Valenis, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England aproximadamente 1146. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1208, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.Stratford St. Andrew, Suffolk, England: стратфорд ст андрю, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha Valoines родилась около 1130 г. в местности парам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Helewise de Valenis, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England около 1146 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1208 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

Se casó con Ranulph de Glanville Chief Justiciar of England aproximadamente 1146. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1208, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años.
